infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NomadNow needs access to your location to show nearby digital nomads and help you discover new connections.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NomadNow needs access to your location to show nearby digital nomads and help you discover new connections.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NomadNow needs access to your camera to take photos for your profile and posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NomadNow needs access to your photo library to select images for your profile and posts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NomadNow needs access to your microphone for voice messages and calls.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow NomadNow to access your location to show nearby digital nomads
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow NomadNow to access your location in the background for real-time updates

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NomadNow to access your photos to select avatar and share images
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NomadNow to access your camera to take photos

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NomadNow to access your media library
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow NomadNow to save photos to your library
